## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make fmt` and `make vet` produce no output
- [ ] New behavior has a test (unit and/or e2e)
- [ ] If the DB schema changed, a new migration file is included and tested against an existing DB
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## Unreleased`
- [ ] Docs updated if any command, flag, or behavior changed
